response.justification: Bogdan is a capable senior/staff engineer with ~20 years of broad technical experience and genuine entrepreneurial instincts, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI expertise and a track record of advising strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption. His AI exposure is both recent (began April 2025) and narrow — MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure — with no evidence of having led or shipped AI platforms at scale, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no demonstrated history of influencing enterprise strategy or inspiring cross-organizational technical direction. The gap between his current scope and the seniority, influence, and AI depth this role requires is significant.
strengths: 20 years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum and signals genuine technical breadth
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, worked at early-stage startups, and has shipped open-source libraries used by real communities
Active knowledge-sharer with public conference talks and multi-day technical workshops, aligning with the role's expectation to inspire internally and externally
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — only ~2 months at re:cinq (April 2025) working on MCP tooling, with no prior AI/ML work, no published research, and no AI products shipped at meaningful scale
No director-level or principal-level scope evident anywhere in the resume — all roles are individual contributor senior/staff positions without strategic advisory or cross-organizational influence
No cloud platform strategy background and no experience advising enterprise or strategic customers on technology adoption, which is a core responsibility of this role
